product.title: Vivi Drop
product.description: A LAN media sync tool that sends photos and videos from your phone to your computer at high speed.

step0.title: Download the PC App
step0.description: Visit vividrop.cn on your computer to download and install.

step1.title: Connect Your Device
step1.description: Scan with your phone or enter the 6-digit pairing code.

step2.title: Start Syncing
step2.description: Send media manually, or enable background auto upload.

item0.title: What if the app keeps looking for devices?
item0.answer: Make sure your phone and computer are on the same Wi-Fi network, and that Vivi Drop for PC is running. Try restarting the desktop app, then tap scan again on your phone, or connect manually with the 6-digit pairing code.

item1.title: Why does auto upload pause?
item1.answer: Auto upload pauses after Wi-Fi changes or when the computer sleeps. Reconnect the device and return to the home screen to resume. It can also pause when background permissions are limited; check that Vivi Drop has background refresh permission in system settings.

item2.title: What should I do if an upload fails?
item2.answer: Check network stability and confirm the PC app is still running. Retry failed tasks from the transfer page, or export a diagnostics bundle and contact support.

item3.title: What if QR pairing does not work?
item3.answer: Aim the phone camera at the QR code shown on the PC. If scanning fails, connect by manually entering the 6-digit pairing code.

item4.title: How long is the trial, and how do I renew?
item4.answer: New users get a 7-day free trial after registration. After it ends, a subscription is required to continue using Vivi Drop. Go to Settings → Membership to view subscription status or purchase.

item5.title: What if the shared folder is empty?
item5.answer: Confirm the shared folder path is available in Vivi Drop on the PC, and that the folder contains files. After setting it, pull to refresh on your phone to see the contents.

contact.exportHint: Send logs to support to help diagnose issues.
